title: stelis frontinensis
intro: Stelis frontinensis is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Stelis frontinensis is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and expectorant properties. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction to be used in herbal remedies, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat wounds and promote healing.
